§6Large Factory Multiblocks§f are scaled-up versions of standard machines.

§bChemical Factory§f example:§f
• Performs §e4 recipes in parallel§f
• §eDouble speed§f operation
• §cDouble power consumption§f
• Consumes §bWater§f coolant
• Outputs §bLow-Pressure Steam§f

§eAdvantages:§f
• Higher throughput
• Space efficiency
• Central control

§aTip:§f Worth the investment for high-volume production.
